programme.title: Swamp Don't Care-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Jake and Melissa face snakes and alligators in a swamp in Florida. S10 E12.

programme.title: Bite Club-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A survivor of animal attacks teams up with an elite hunter in the African feeding ground. S10 E08.

programme.title: Bite Club-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A survivor of animal attacks teams up with an elite hunter in the African feeding ground. S10 E08.

programme.title: Texas-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear drops from a bi-plane into the Chihuahuan Desert in West Texas. S04 E04.

programme.title: Fight Iron With Iron-Gold Rush
programme.desc: Parker fights muddy ground as Fred discovers a new paystreak that changes everything. S13 E06.

programme.title: 18 Wheels Across India
programme.desc: A popular Polish lorry driver navigates India's notorious roads and explores the culture.

programme.title: Into the Wild With Bear Grylls and Akshay Kumar
programme.desc: Akshay Kumar joins survivalist Bear Grylls as they tackle the forests of India.

programme.title: Vietnam-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls tackles rocky terrain and deadly creatures deep in the heart of Vietnam. S04 E03.

programme.title: Backcountry Ice Man: Chuck Liddell-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario Kalpou's passion leads him to some of the most extreme environments on the planet. S02 E09.

programme.title: Man Eating Crocs-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario faces some of the most dangerous man-eating crocodiles on the planet. S02 E01.

programme.title: 18 Wheels Across India
programme.desc: A popular Polish lorry driver navigates India's notorious roads and explores the culture.

programme.title: Untouched Atolls-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: The host gives a lesson on how to fish reefs and attempts to swim with sailfish. S02 E04.

programme.title: Python & Saw Palmetto-WildFed
programme.desc: The host searches for wild ingredients and turns them into gourmet meals for loved ones. S02 E05.

programme.title: Texas-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear drops from a bi-plane into the Chihuahuan Desert in West Texas. S04 E04.

programme.title: Llanos de Vichada-Dual Survival Mexico
programme.desc: Fernanda and Palma must combine their skills and ingenuity to cross a savannah. S01 E05.

programme.title: Tanzania-Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage
programme.desc: Ed meets the Hadzabe of Tanzania, who collect honey from aggressive bees. S01 E03.

programme.title: Sierra Nevada-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear uses his knowledge to build shelters, calm horses and find food in the Sierra Nevada. S01 E06.

programme.title: Surviving the Stone Age
programme.desc: Surviving the Stone Age

programme.title: Namibian Nightmare-Dual Survival
programme.desc: Joe and Matt race against time to escape the vast scrubland of Namibia. S05 E13.

programme.title: Alaskan Mountain Range-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear uses his skills and knowledge to journey across the Chugach Mountains, Alaska. S01 E04.

programme.title: Vietnam-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls tackles rocky terrain and deadly creatures deep in the heart of Vietnam. S04 E03.

programme.title: Tanzania-Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage
programme.desc: Ed meets the Hadzabe of Tanzania, who collect honey from aggressive bees. S01 E03.

programme.title: Kalahari Bushmen-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: The host joins the Naru people to embark on an adventure in the Kalahari Desert. S02 E03.

programme.title: Untouched Atolls-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: The host gives a lesson on how to fish reefs and attempts to swim with sailfish. S02 E04.

programme.title: Bear Encounter-Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage
programme.desc: Ed undergoes dangerous tribal rites to discover what it means to be a better person.

programme.title: Curse of the Swamp-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A survivalist and an Air Force veteran try to survive in the swamps of Louisiana. S07 E09.

programme.title: Curse of the Swamp: Part 2-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Jeremy and Melanie face many challenges to survive in the swamps of Louisiana. S07 E10.

programme.title: Worlds Collide-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Former military man Chance and naturalist Melissa face the Amazon’s storms and predators. S07 E12.
